calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Bringing Trust Under Court Supervision And For Appointment Of Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Mar-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch.

The Court stated that there had been competing petitions for Successor Trustee on calendar with the conservatorship but the Conservatee passed away. Ms. Rasch stated that she had spoken with Terese Raddie, that Ms. Raddie stated they have withdrawn their petition, that they have no objection to Ms. Dolch's petition, that the sole beneficiary wants the petition granted, and that the sole beneficiary does not want the Trust under Court supervision. The Court ordered the petition by Lynn Stevenson off calendar and granted the petition appointing Debra Dolch as the Successor Trustee (order signed in open court) based upon the representations by Ms. Rasch.

At the request of Ms. Rasch, the Court signed an order extending Ms. Dolch as the Temporary Successor Trustee covering up to today so there would be no gap.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Court Investigator: Melinda Jean. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.
